name: Chocolate Amaretto Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Blanched almonds, lightly toasted and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Combine the crumbs, almonds, sugar, and butter. Press mixture into the bottom and sides of a 10-inch springform pan.
3. In a large bowl, cream together the softened cream cheese, sugar, heavy cream, Amaretto, and vanilla extract. Beat in one egg at a time until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan. Bake for 1 hour and 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
5. Let cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes before removing from the pan.
6. In another bowl, mix together sour cream, vanilla extract, and sugar until smooth. Spread evenly over the cooled cake.
7. Return to oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes or until set.
8. Remove from oven and let cool completely on a rack.
9. Wrap lightly in wax paper and chill in refrigerator overnight.
10. When ready to serve, remove sides of the pan and garnish with toasted almonds around the outer edge and on top of the cake.
